ABS Plastic Injection Molding: Processing and Design Guide | MoldMinds Services Free Tools China Sourcing Blog About Get a Free Quote Back to Blog Injection Molding ABS Plastic Injection Molding: Processing and Design Guide Brandon Henderson April 13, 2026 9 min read The Short Answer ABS plastic injection molding is one of the most forgiving processes in the thermoplastics toolkit, but “forgiving” does not mean error-proof. Run ABS at the wrong melt temperature or with moisture above 0.1%, and you will scrap parts. Get the conditions right and you can hold tolerances of ±0.003 in/in on a $14,0
